narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp F (precinct in Warren County) has 846 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
